nrqlQueries.query: FROM SystemSample SELECT uniqueCount(hostname) as 'Devices' WHERE store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago
FROM SystemSample SELECT uniqueCount(hostname) as 'Devices' WHERE store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET device.type SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

FROM Log SELECT uniqueCount(concat(host.name, Name, Node)) as 'Unique Plugins/Host/Node' WHERE source= 'newposHeartbeat' and State='Zombie' and store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET hostname, Name as 'Plugin name' SINCE 1 day ago limit max
SELECT count(*) as 'Application Restart' FROM appRestart where store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago

widgets.title: Percentage of Application Restarts by Reason

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM appRestart WHERE store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET cases(WHERE restartCase = 'rfmPackage' AS 'RFM/Binary update', restartCase = 'logOnOff' AS 'Windows logoff', restartCase = 'automatedReboot' AS 'Automated Reboot', WHERE restartCase = 'remoteReboot' as 'Remote restart command', WHERE restartCase = 'unknown' as 'Unknown', WHERE restartCase = 'deviceReboot' as 'Device Reboot') as 'Reason' SINCE 1 day ago

widgets.title: Number of Application Restarts by Reason + Device Type

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) as 'Application Restarts' FROM appRestart where store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET cases(WHERE restartCase = 'rfmPackage' AS 'RFM/Binary update', restartCase = 'logOnOff' AS 'Windows logoff', WHERE restartCase = 'automatedReboot' AS 'Automated Reboot', WHERE restartCase = 'remoteReboot' as 'Remote restart command', WHERE restartCase = 'unknown' as 'Unknown', WHERE restartCase = 'deviceReboot' as 'Device Reboot') as 'Reason', host.name SINCE 1 day ago

SELECT latest(toDateTime(timestamp, 'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm')) as 'Date' FROM XMLRPC WHERE node = 'POS' and device.type != 'CSO' FACET cases(where online = 1 as 'ONLINE', online = 0 as 'OFFLINE') as 'State', id as 'POS ID', alias WHERE store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

SELECT latest(toDateTime(timestamp, 'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm')) as 'Date' from XMLRPC where node = 'POS' and device.type = 'CSO'  facet cases(where online = 1 as 'ONLINE', online = 0 as 'OFFLINE') as 'State', id as 'POS ID', alias  where store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' since 24 hours ago limit max

FROM Metric SELECT latest(toDateTime(timestamp, 'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm')) as 'Date' where job = 'blackbox' and probe_success IS NOT NULL and substring(hostname,7,3) NOT IN ('POS','CSO') and substring(hostname,2,5) = '{{tags.store.number}}' facet cases(where getField(probe_success, latest) = 1 as 'ONLINE', getField(probe_success, latest) != 1 as 'OFFLINE') as 'State', hostname, substring(hostname,2,5) as 'store.number' SINCE 1 day ago limit max

with ( SELECT latest(timestamp) from NrAiIncident since 1 hour ago) as duration FROM NrAiIncident select (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'  where incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) from NrAiIncident where conditionName like 'Primary Production Down' and event = 'close' since 1 day ago) and conditionName like 'Primary Production Down' and event = 'open' and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' limit max since 1 day ago facet incidentLink, tags.store.number as 'Store Number'

with ( SELECT latest(timestamp) from NrAiIncident since 1 hour ago) as duration FROM NrAiIncident select (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'  where incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) from NrAiIncident where conditionName like 'Backup Production Unavailable' and event = 'close' since 1 day ago) and conditionName like 'Backup Production Unavailable' and event = 'open' and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' limit max since 1 day ago facet incidentLink, tags.store.number as 'Store Number'

widgets.title: POS's with different Package than way station

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT filter(count(*), where string(WayPackage) != string(pkg)) from XMLRPC where online = '1' and node='POS' and store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' facet store.number, id as 'ID', WayPackage, pkg as 'Package' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Open list of incidents for POS with different Package than way station

nrqlQueries.query: WITH (SELECT latest(timestamp) FROM NrAiIncident since 1 hour ago) as duration FROM NrAiIncident SELECT (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)' WHERE incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) FROM NrAiIncident where conditionName like 'POS with different package than way station' and event = 'close' and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 month ago) and conditionName like 'POS with different package than way station' and event = 'open' and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET incidentLink, tags.store.number as 'Store Number', tags.ID as 'FOE ID' LIMIT MAX SINCE 1 day ago
